title: Puppy's Frames
body:
### This simple resource pack cuts the edges of vanilla item frames and makes them 6x6 pixels in size. They have less visual noise, but they are still clearly visible.
![Minimalistic item frames from the resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a92376cd60d721dbb14e5e3899440c7c45aca82a.png)
_This resource pack is perfect for role-playing texture packs!_

**Progress:**
The resource pack supports Minecraft versions 1.18 – 1.21.5, but it may also work with some older versions.
